title: clusia nervosa
intro: Clusia nervosa, also known as the "Calabura" or "Golden Ball," is a tropical evergreen shrub native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Clusia nervosa is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
